title: Function Before Form
quote: Design is not just what it looks like and feels like. Design is how it works.
author: Steve Jobs
interpretation: Beautiful design must serve a purpose. The best interfaces fade into the background, letting users accomplish their goals without friction.

title: Observe Behavior
quote: To design an easy-to-use interface, pay attention to what users do, not what they say.
author: Jakob Nielsen
interpretation: Real insights come from watching how people actually use systems, not from assumptions or self-reported preferences.

title: Design for Change
author: Heraclitus
interpretation: Systems must be flexible and adaptable. Design for evolution, not perfection, and build structures that can grow with emerging needs.

title: Design for Real Behavior
quote: We must design for the way people behave, not for how we wish they would behave.
author: Don Norman
interpretation: Effective design meets people where they are, accommodating human nature rather than fighting against it.

title: Experience Matters
quote: People will forget what you did, but people will never forget how you made them feel.
author: Maya Angelou
interpretation: Beyond functionality, great design creates positive emotional experiences that build trust and lasting relationships.

title: Intellectual Honesty
quote: The first principle is that you must not fool yourself and you are the easiest person to fool.
author: Richard Feynman
interpretation: Question assumptions, validate decisions with evidence, and remain humble about what you do not know. Good design requires truth.
